title: Directional Easing, Liquid Glass, Text Charts, Peel Reveal & Radial Menus
description: 5 fresh UI drops: interruption-aware easing, SVG liquid-glass refraction, text-to-chart typography, a peel-reveal cursor, and a radial marking menu.

drops.title: Adaptive Directional Easing
drops.description: Reverse an animation mid-flight and it re-bases onto a distinct easing curve instead of jarringly inverting the forward one.
drops.concept: GSAP 3.15 (Apr 2026) shipped easeReverse: instead of mathematically inverting the forward ease when a tween reverses, it captures the current interpolated value and re-derives progress against a separate easing function assigned for the reverse direction, so rapid interruptions never snap or jump. This demo reimplements the interruptible-reverse engine from scratch in vanilla JS with a naive-vs-adaptive comparison mode.

interaction.mouse: Click panels rapidly to interrupt mid-animation
interaction.touch: Tap to toggle, same as click

drops.title: Liquid Glass Panels
drops.description: Draggable glass panels that actually bend the content behind them via an SVG displacement map, with chromatic-aberration edges.
drops.concept: samasante/liquid-glass recreates Apple's Liquid Glass material with pure SVG filters: a generated RGB displacement map (X/Y offsets + specular mask) drives feDisplacementMap to lens whatever sits behind the panel, and running the filter three times with a per-channel offset produces the rainbow chromatic-aberration fringe at the edges — no WebGL involved.

interaction.mouse: Drag glass panels over the animated background
interaction.touch: Drag with one finger to reposition

drops.title: Text-to-Chart Typography
drops.description: Type {b:1,3,7,9} inline in a sentence and it renders as a live bar/line/pie glyph, tunable like variable-font axes.
drops.concept: franktisellano/datatype is an OpenType variable font that uses ligature substitution to turn bracket patterns like {b:1,3,7,9} into inline chart glyphs, with wdth/wght font-variation axes controlling spacing and stroke weight. Since a custom font binary can't ship here, this demo reimplements the author-experience with JS text-scanning + inline SVG glyph substitution and CSS @property-driven variable transitions.

interaction.mouse: Edit the text and drag sliders
interaction.click: Click regenerate to swap in new random data
interaction.touch: Tap to edit text, drag sliders

drops.title: Peel-Reveal Cursor Trail
drops.description: Your cursor becomes a glowing eraser that peels one layer back to reveal another underneath, then self-heals shut.
drops.concept: rajchaitanya03/BATMAN stacks two canvas layers and uses destination-out compositing with an offscreen tapered-radial-gradient trail mask to punch a snake-shaped hole through the top layer wherever the cursor has traveled, healing shut after ~100ms of inactivity. This demo procedurally generates the layer pairs since no image assets are available.

interaction.mouse: Move the pointer across the canvas to reveal
interaction.touch: Drag a finger across the canvas to reveal

drops.title: Radial Marking Menu
drops.description: A pie-shaped context menu that reads drag angle and distance instead of a click list — flick-select for experts, hover-and-pick for everyone else.
drops.concept: Kando reframes the context menu as a radial pie menu: opening anchors the center at the pointer, dragging outward computes the active wedge via atan2 angle math, and crossing a radius threshold commits a fast "flick-select" gesture while a slower drag-and-release supports deliberate picking. Nested wedges open child pie menus to chain gestures without stopping.

interaction.mouse: Press and drag outward from a trigger tile to select a wedge
interaction.touch: Press and drag with one finger, release to select
